error_signature: The service was not able to process your request
title: Error processing request with gpt-4o-transcribe-diarize model
symptom: When attempting to use the gpt-4o-transcribe-diarize model with an mp3 file, the error 'The service was not able to process your request' is returned.
applies_when: Using OpenAI node with gpt-4o-transcribe-diarize model
not_this_if: Input is not an mp3 file
root_cause: The gpt-4o-transcribe-diarize model does not accept binary data directly in the user prompt. Instead, it requires a direct API call to process audio files, which is not supported through the standard node configuration.
fix_steps: Use an HTTP request node to call the OpenAI transcription endpoint
Pass the mp3 file as binary data in the request body
Configure the request with the necessary headers and parameters as per the OpenAI API documentation
agent_instruction: Make an HTTP request to the OpenAI transcription endpoint with the mp3 file as binary data.
